session.user:
Run prettier --check on the two changed files and report results: - docs/learned/architecture/erk-architecture.md - docs/learned/testing/cli-testing.md
Run from /home/runner/work/erk/erk
session.assistant: I'll run prettier --check on those two files for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check formatting on two documentation files with prettier

session.tool_result: Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style!
session.assistant:
prettier passed: Both files are properly formatted.
- /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/architecture/erk-architecture.md - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/testing/cli-testing.md
